case_title: CATHERINE DEBOLT VS. ANTHONY TRASK ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 SERVED OCT-25-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRASK, ANTHONY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEBOLT, CATHERINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRASK, ANTHONY REGELMAN, KAREN $1,266.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,316.00, $1266 PLUS COSTS FOR THE REASONS STATED IN THE ATTACHED MEMORANDUM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-10-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF CATHERINE DEBOLT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANTHONY TRASK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KAREN REGELMAN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY HER HUSBAND ANTHONY TRASK. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
